description: Sample code-implementation demo: each story implements one REST endpoint (handler + tests). The acceptance gate is a CommandGate that runs the per-endpoint pytest file.

userStories.title: BATCH-001 · GET /health
userStories.description: Implement examples/openapi-impl/src/handlers/health.py exposing get_health() returning {"status":"ok"}. Tests at examples/openapi-impl/tests/test_health.py must pass.

userStories.title: BATCH-002 · GET /users/{id}
userStories.description: Implement examples/openapi-impl/src/handlers/users.py exposing get_user(user_id: str) returning {'id': user_id, 'name': '...'}. Use a dict-backed in-memory store for the demo.
